derived.expense: {{ (Qty|float * Price|float)|money if Qty and Price else Expense }}
derived.qty: {{ Qty if Qty and Price else 1 }}
derived.price: {{ Price if Qty and Price else Expense }}
derived.type: {% if Type == 'Raw' %}{% set name, number = Character|split_card_number %}{{ name }} | {{ number }}{% elif Type.upper().startswith(graded_prefixes) %}{% set name, number = Character|split_card_number %}{{ Type }} | {{ name }} | {{ number }}{% else %}{{ Type }}{% endif %}
derived.url: {% if Set.startswith(non_english_prefixes) %}{% if Type == 'Raw' or Type.upper().startswith(graded_prefixes) %}{% set name, number = Character|split_card_number %}{% set sid = snkrdunk_ids.get(Set, {}).get(number) %}{% else %}{% set sid = snkrdunk_ids.get(Set, {}).get(Type) %}{% endif %}{% if sid %}https://snkrdunk.com/apparels/{{ sid }}{% endif %}{% else %}{% set blocked = Type == 'Raw' or Type.upper().startswith(graded_prefixes) %}{% if blocked %}{% set name, number = Character|split_card_number %}https://www.pricecharting.com/search-products?type=prices&q={{ (name ~ ' ' ~ number)|urlencode }}{% else %}{% set slug = Type|type_slug %}{% if slug %}https://www.pricecharting.com/game/pokemon-{{ Set|slugify }}/{{ slug }}{% endif %}{% endif %}{% endif %}
